# terrible_awx_awx_role (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `role` (String) The role type to grant/revoke.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `credential` (String) Credential name, ID, or named URL the role acts on. Deprecated, use 'credentials'.
- `credentials` (String) Credential names, IDs, or named URLs the role acts on.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `instance_groups` (String) Instance Group names, IDs, or named URLs the role acts on.
- `inventories` (String) Inventory names, IDs, or named URLs the role acts on.
- `inventory` (String) Inventory name, ID, or named URL the role acts on. Deprecated, use 'inventories'.
- `job_template` (String) The job template name, ID, or named URL the role acts on. Deprecated, use 'job_templates'.
- `job_templates` (String) The job template names, IDs, or named URLs the role acts on.
- `lookup_organization` (String) Organization name, ID, or named URL the inventories, job templates, projects, or workflows the items exists in. Used to help lookup the object, for organization roles see organization. If not provided, will lookup by name only, which does not work with duplicates.
- `organization` (String) Organization name, ID, or named URL the role acts on. Deprecated, use 'organizations'.
- `organizations` (String) Organization names, IDs, or named URLs the role acts on.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `project` (String) Project name, ID, or named URL the role acts on. Deprecated, use 'projects'.
- `projects` (String) Project names, IDs, or named URLs the role acts on.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Desired state. State of present indicates the user should have the role. State of absent indicates the user should have the role taken away, if they have it.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `target_team` (String) Team name, ID, or named URL that the role acts on. For example, make someone a member or an admin of a team. Members of a team implicitly receive the permissions that the team has. Deprecated, use 'target_teams'.
- `target_teams` (String) Team names, IDs, or named URLs that the role acts on. For example, make someone a member or an admin of a team. Members of a team implicitly receive the permissions that the team has.
- `team` (String) Team name, ID, or named URL that receives the permissions specified by the role. Deprecated, use 'teams'.
- `teams` (String) Team names, IDs, or named URLs that receive the permissions specified by the role.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `user` (String) User name, ID, or named URL that receives the permissions specified by the role. Deprecated, use 'users'.
- `users` (String) User names, IDs, or named URLs that receive the permissions specified by the role.
- `workflow` (String) The workflow job template name, ID, or named URL the role acts on. Deprecated, use 'workflows'.
- `workflows` (String) The workflow job template names, IDs, or named URLs the role acts on.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
